en: Then the men of Ephraim said to him, "What is this that you have done to us, not to call us when you went to fight with Midian?" And they accused him fiercely.
zh: 以法蓮人對基甸說：“你去與米甸人爭戰的時候，沒有召我們同去，你為甚麼這樣待我們呢？”他們就與他激烈地爭辯起來。

en: And he said to them, "What have I done now in comparison with you? Is not the gleaning of the grapes of Ephraim better than the grape harvest of Abiezer?
zh: 基甸對他們說：“我所行的怎能比得上你們呢？在以法蓮拾取剩下的葡萄，不是比在亞比以謝收摘的葡萄更好嗎？

en: God has given into your hands the princes of Midian, Oreb and Zeeb. What have I been able to do in comparison with you?" Then their anger against him subsided when he said this.
zh: 神已經把米甸人的兩個首領：俄立和西伊伯，交在你們的手裡了；我所行的怎能與你們相比呢？”基甸說了這話，他們的怒氣就平息了。

en: And Gideon came to the Jordan and crossed over, he and the 300 men who were with him, exhausted yet pursuing.
zh: 基甸來到約旦河，就過了河；他和與他在一起的三百人雖然都很疲乏，仍然追趕敵人。

en: So he said to the men of Succoth, "Please give loaves of bread to the people who follow me, for they are exhausted, and I am pursuing after Zebah and Zalmunna, the kings of Midian."
zh: 基甸對疏割人說：“求你們把幾個餅給跟隨我的人吃，因為他們疲乏了，我還要繼續追趕米甸人和兩個王西巴和撒慕拿。”

en: And the officials of Succoth said, "Are the hands of Zebah and Zalmunna already in your hand, that we should give bread to your army?"
zh: 疏割人的首領回答：“西巴和撒慕拿現在不是已經在你的手裡嗎？我們應該把餅送給你的軍隊吃嗎？”

en: So Gideon said, "Well then, when the LORD has given Zebah and Zalmunna into my hand, I will flail your flesh with the thorns of the wilderness and with briers."
zh: 基甸說：“好吧，耶和華把西巴和撒慕拿交在我手裡的時候，我就必用野地的荊棘鞭打你們的身體。”

en: And from there he went up to Penuel, and spoke to them in the same way, and the men of Penuel answered him as the men of Succoth had answered.
zh: 基甸從那裡上到毘努伊勒，也向他們說了同樣的話；毘努伊勒人回答他也像疏割人回答的一樣。

en: And he said to the men of Penuel, "When I come again in peace, I will break down this tower."
zh: 他亦對毘努伊勒人說：“我平平安安回來的時候，我必拆毀這座望樓。”

en: Now Zebah and Zalmunna were in Karkor with their army, about 15,000 men, all who were left of all the army of the people of the East, for there had fallen 120,000 men who drew the sword.
zh: 那時，西巴和撒慕拿正在加各，與他們在一起的軍隊約有一萬五千人，就是東方人全營剩下的，因為有十二萬持刀的已經倒下了。

en: And Gideon went up by the way of the tent dwellers east of Nobah and Jogbehah and attacked the army, for the army felt secure.
zh: 基甸就從挪巴和約比哈東面，順著住帳棚的人的路上去；在敵軍以為安全而不戒備的時候，擊敗了敵軍。

en: And Zebah and Zalmunna fled, and he pursued them and captured the two kings of Midian, Zebah and Zalmunna, and he threw all the army into a panic.
zh: 西巴和撒慕拿逃跑；基甸追趕他們，捉住了米甸人的兩個王西巴和撒慕拿，使全軍都驚惶。

en: Then Gideon the son of Joash returned from the battle by the ascent of Heres.
zh: 約阿施的兒子基甸從戰場沿著希列斯的山坡回來，

en: And he captured a young man of Succoth and questioned him. And he wrote down for him the officials and elders of Succoth, seventy-seven men.
zh: 捉住了疏割人中的一個青年人，查問他；他就把疏割的首領和長老的名字寫給他，共七十七人。

en: And he came to the men of Succoth and said, "Behold Zebah and Zalmunna, about whom you taunted me, saying, 'Are the hands of Zebah and Zalmunna already in your hand, that we should give bread to your men who are exhausted?'"
zh: 基甸到了疏割人那裡，就說：“你看，西巴和撒慕拿，你們為了他們曾經譏笑我說：‘西巴和撒慕拿現在不是在你的手裡嗎？我們應該把餅送給你那些疲乏的人吃嗎？’”

en: And he took the elders of the city, and he took thorns of the wilderness and briers and with them taught the men of Succoth a lesson.
zh: 於是拿住那城的長老，又拿起野地的荊棘，用荊棘把疏割人教訓了一頓；

en: And he broke down the tower of Penuel and killed the men of the city.
zh: 又拆毀了毘努伊勒的望樓，殺死了那城裡的人。

en: Then he said to Zebah and Zalmunna, "Where are the men whom you killed at Tabor?" They answered, "As you are, so were they. Every one of them resembled the son of a king."
zh: 基甸問西巴和撒慕拿：“你們在他泊山上所殺的人，是甚麼模樣的人？”他們回答：“他們像你一樣，每一個都像王子的模樣。”

en: And he said, "They were my brothers, the sons of my mother. As the LORD lives, if you had saved them alive, I would not kill you."
zh: 基甸說：“他們是我的兄弟，是我母親的兒子；我指著永活的耶和華起誓，如果你們從前讓他們存活，我現在就不殺你們了。”

en: So he said to Jether his firstborn, "Rise and kill them!" But the young man did not draw his sword, for he was afraid, because he was still a young man.
zh: 於是對他的長子益帖說：“起來，把他們殺了吧。”但是那孩子不敢拔刀，只是害怕，因為他還是個孩子。

en: Then Zebah and Zalmunna said, "Rise yourself and fall upon us, for as the man is, so is his strength." And Gideon arose and killed Zebah and Zalmunna, and he took the crescent ornaments that were on the necks of their camels.
zh: 西巴和撒慕拿說：“你親自起來殺我們吧；因為人怎樣，他的力量也怎樣。”於是基甸起來，把西巴和撒慕拿殺了，拿了他們駱駝頸項上的月牙圈。

en: Then the men of Israel said to Gideon, "Rule over us, you and your son and your grandson also, for you have saved us from the hand of Midian."
zh: 以色列人對基甸說：“你既然拯救我們脫離了米甸人的手，求你和你的子孫統治我們。”

en: Gideon said to them, "I will not rule over you, and my son will not rule over you; the LORD will rule over you."
zh: 基甸回答他們：“我不統治你們，我的子孫也不統治你們，唯有耶和華統治你們。”

en: And Gideon said to them, "Let me make a request of you: every one of you give me the earrings from his spoil." (For they had golden earrings, because they were Ishmaelites.)
zh: 基甸又對他們說：“我有一個要求：請把你們各人奪得的耳環給我。”原來敵人都戴金耳環，因為他們是以實瑪利人。

en: And they answered, "We will willingly give them." And they spread a cloak, and every man threw in it the earrings of his spoil.
zh: 他們回答：“我們願意給你。”於是鋪開一件外衣，各人把奪得的耳環丟在上面。

en: And the weight of the golden earrings that he requested was 1,700 shekels of gold, besides the crescent ornaments and the pendants and the purple garments worn by the kings of Midian, and besides the collars that were around the necks of their camels.
zh: 基甸所要的金耳環，共重約二十公斤金子，此外還有米甸王身上的月牙圈、耳墜和紫紅色的衣服，另外還有駱駝頸項上的鍊子。

en: And Gideon made an ephod of it and put it in his city, in Ophrah. And all Israel whored after it there, and it became a snare to Gideon and to his family.
zh: 基甸用這些金子做了一個以弗得，安置在他的城俄弗拉；後來以色列眾人都在那裡隨從以弗得行了邪淫，因此這就成了基甸和他全家的網羅。

en: So Midian was subdued before the people of Israel, and they raised their heads no more. And the land had rest forty years in the days of Gideon.
zh: 這樣，米甸人在以色列人面前就被制伏了，不能再抬起頭來；基甸在世的日子，國中太平了四十年。

en: Jerubbaal the son of Joash went and lived in his own house.
zh: 約阿施的兒子耶路．巴力回去，住在自己家裡。

en: Now Gideon had seventy sons, his own offspring, for he had many wives.
zh: 基甸有七十個兒子，都是他親生的，因為他有很多妻子。

en: And his concubine who was in Shechem also bore him a son, and he called his name Abimelech.
zh: 他在示劍的妾，也給他生了一個兒子，他給他起名叫亞比米勒。

en: And Gideon the son of Joash died in a good old age and was buried in the tomb of Joash his father, at Ophrah of the Abiezrites.
zh: 約阿施的兒子基甸壽數滿足而死，埋葬在亞比以謝族的俄弗拉，在他父親約阿施的墳墓裡。

en: As soon as Gideon died, the people of Israel turned again and whored after the Baals and made Baal-berith their god.
zh: 基甸死了以後，以色列人又轉去隨從眾巴力，行邪淫，並且以巴力．比利土作他們的神。

en: And the people of Israel did not remember the LORD their God, who had delivered them from the hand of all their enemies on every side,
zh: 以色列人忘記了耶和華他們的 神，就是曾經拯救他們脫離四圍仇敵之手的那位；

en: and they did not show steadfast love to the family of Jerubbaal (that is, Gideon) in return for all the good that he had done to Israel.
zh: 也沒有照著基甸向以色列人所施的一切恩惠，恩待耶路．巴力，就是基甸的家。
